# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

require 'sendgrid-ruby'

class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  include SendGrid

  default from: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL', 'noreply@example.com')

  def initialize
    super
    @api_key = fetch_api_key
    @sendgrid_client = SendGrid::API.new(api_key: @api_key)
  end

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @subject = 'Welcome!'
    @body = render_to_string(template: 'sendgrid_mailer/welcome_email')

    deliver_via_sendgrid(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: @subject,
      html_content: @body
    )
  end

  def notification_email(user, subject:, body:)
    @user = user
    @subject = subject
    @body = body

    deliver_via_sendgrid(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: @subject,
      html_content: @body
    )
  end

  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token
    @subject = 'Password Reset Instructions'
    @body = render_to_string(template: 'sendgrid_mailer/password_reset_email')

    deliver_via_sendgrid(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: @subject,
      html_content: @body
    )
  end

  def custom_email(to:, subject:, html_content:, plain_text_content: nil, from: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, attachments_list: nil, categories: nil, template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil)
    deliver_via_sendgrid(
      to: to,
      from: from,
      subject: subject,
      html_content: html_content,
      plain_text_content: plain_text_content,
      cc: cc,
      bcc: bcc,
      attachments_list: attachments_list,
      categories: categories,
      template_id: template_id,
      dynamic_template_data: dynamic_template_data
    )
  end

  private

  def fetch_api_key
    api_key = ENV['SENDGRID_API_KEY']

    if api_key.blank? && defined?(Rails.application.credentials)
      api_key = Rails.application.credentials.dig(:sendgrid, :api_key)
    end

    if api_key.blank? && defined?(Rails.application.secrets)
      api_key = Rails.application.secrets.sendgrid_api_key
    end

    if api_key.blank?
      raise SendgridMailerError, 'SendGrid API key is not configured. Set SENDGRID_API_KEY environment variable or add it to Rails credentials.'
    end

    api_key
  end

  def deliver_via_sendgrid(to:, subject:, html_content:, from: nil, plain_text_content: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, attachments_list: nil, categories: nil, template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil)
    mail = SendGrid::Mail.new

    from_email = from || self.class.default[:from]
    mail.from = Email.new(email: from_email)

    personalization = Personalization.new
    personalization.add_to(Email.new(email: to))

    if cc.present?
      Array(cc).each do |cc_email|
        personalization.add_cc(Email.new(email: cc_email))
      end
    end

    if bcc.present?
      Array(bcc).each do |bcc_email|
        personalization.add_bcc(Email.new(email: bcc_email))
      end
    end

    if dynamic_template_data.present?
      dynamic_template_data.each do |key, value|
        personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
      end
    end

    personalization.subject = subject
    mail.add_personalization(personalization)

    if template_id.present?
      mail.template_id = template_id
    else
      mail.add_content(Content.new(type: 'text/html', value: html_content))

      if plain_text_content.present?
        mail.add_content(Content.new(type: 'text/plain', value: plain_text_content))
      end
    end

    if attachments_list.present?
      Array(attachments_list).each do |attachment_data|
        attachment = Attachment.new
        attachment.content = Base64.strict_encode64(attachment_data[:content])
        attachment.type = attachment_data[:type] || 'application/octet-stream'
        attachment.filename = attachment_data[:filename]
        attachment.disposition = attachment_data[:disposition] || 'attachment'
        mail.add_attachment(attachment)
      end
    end

    if categories.present?
      Array(categories).each do |category_name|
        mail.add_category(Category.new(name: category_name))
      end
    end

    add_tracking_settings(mail)

    send_with_error_handling(mail)
  end

  def add_tracking_settings(mail)
    tracking_settings = TrackingSettings.new

    if ENV['SENDGRID_CLICK_TRACKING_ENABLED'] == 'true'
      click_tracking = ClickTracking.new
      click_tracking.enable = true
      tracking_settings.click_tracking = click_tracking
    end

    if ENV['SENDGRID_OPEN_TRACKING_ENABLED'] == 'true'
      open_tracking = OpenTracking.new
      open_tracking.enable = true
      tracking_settings.open_tracking = open_tracking
    end

    mail.tracking_settings = tracking_settings
  end

  def send_with_error_handling(mail)
    if sandbox_mode?
      mail_settings = MailSettings.new
      sandbox = SandBoxMode.new
      sandbox.enable = true
      mail_settings.sandbox_mode = sandbox
      mail.mail_settings = mail_settings

      Rails.logger.info("[SendgridMailer] Sandbox mode enabled - email will not be delivered")
    end

    response = @sendgrid_client.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: mail.to_json)

    status_code = response.status_code.to_i

    if status_code >= 200 && status_code < 300
      Rails.logger.info("[SendgridMailer] Email sent successfully. Status: #{response.status_code}")
      response
    else
      error_body = begin
        JSON.parse(response.body)
      rescue JSON::ParserError
        response.body
      end

      Rails.logger.error("[SendgridMailer] Failed to send email. Status: #{response.status_code}, Body: #{error_body}")
      raise SendgridDeliveryError.new(
        "SendGrid delivery failed with status #{response.status_code}: #{error_body}",
        status_code: response.status_code,
        response_body: error_body
      )
    end
  rescue StandardError => e
    raise if e.is_a?(SendgridDeliveryError) || e.is_a?(SendgridMailerError)

    Rails.logger.error("[SendgridMailer] Unexpected error: #{e.message}")
    raise SendgridMailerError, "Unexpected error sending email: #{e.message}"
  end

  def sandbox_mode?
    return true if ENV['SENDGRID_SANDBOX_MODE'] == 'true'
    return true if Rails.env.development? || Rails.env.test?

    false
  end

  class SendgridMailerError < StandardError; end

  class SendgridDeliveryError < SendgridMailerError
    attr_reader :status_code, :response_body

    def initialize(message, status_code: nil, response_body: nil)
      @status_code = status_code
      @response_body = response_body
      super(message)
    end
  end
end
